name: @ont/resolver
description: ONT clean runnable resolver service. Thin HTTP shell over @ont/adapter-resolver with an injected store port; no consensus or indexer rule reimplementation.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/anchor-store && npm run build -w @ont/header-store && npm run build -w @ont/name-state-store && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && vitest run
